productDisplayName: Puma Men Redon Move Black Shoes
description: The Redon Move shoes from puma features the signature formstripe on the side, in a classic, neat silhouetted shoe. Sleek as a football shoe, yet referencing the monk strap in styling, this shoe is sure to become a closet favourite.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforated details for breathabilityPadded collar and tongue for snug comfortPatent-leather formstripe logoCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortMesh liningElasticated insert and a strap with the Velcro closure on the midfootMidsoleEVA midsole for durabilityOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with terraced lugs on the toe region and a suction point at the heelBranding and patterned grooves all over the outsoleShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washStore away from sunlight
